reports.thesis: Strongest honest short case for the ETH leg, rebutting the Bull's 'new long money' read directly: the same longs stacking into a twice-rejected resistance are the fuel for a flush, not proof of strength. Long/short ratio 1.31 (crowded longs) plus elevated funding (longs paying to hold) into a stalling tape is the crowded-long flush — the co-equal mirror of a squeeze long. I want the relative-value short vs BTC on a confirmed 4h breakdown, invalidated by a reclaim of the shelf.

signals.rebuts_bull: rising OI into the failing high is trapped longs = liquidation fuel
